falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would contradict the pattern's expectation of a continuation from the bottom_2024_aug setup.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score exceeds 50 (current score: 39) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 50 would indicate a high-pressure top formation, directly opposing the bottom pattern's characteristics.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 150% of the 14-day average on a single day with a price surge of 3%+
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge would signal a breakout or reversal, invalidating the HOLD signal's expectation of a prolonged consolidation phase.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
